Fields.Name: Defence
Fields.Description: Attack power below this value is no damage

Fields.Name: External Texture ID
Fields.Description: mAA / mAA_ ????. Tpf (-1 None) (AA Area number)

Fields.Name: Material ID
Fields.Description: Material ID. Treated the same as the floor material. When -1, the same behavior as before

Fields.Name: Destruction Animation ID
Fields.Description: What is the animation destruction ID from 0 to what?

Fields.Name: Is Camera Hit
Fields.Description: Does the camera hit (0 not hit, 1 hit)

Fields.Name: Is Broken by Player Collision
Fields.Description: Broken when the player touches (0 no, 1)

Fields.Name: Is Animated Destruction
Fields.Description: Is it animation destruction (0 physical destruction, 1 animation destruction)

Fields.Name: Is Hit by Penetrating Bullets
Fields.Description: Will the penetrating bullet hit (0 not hit, 1 hit)

Fields.Name: Is Character Hit
Fields.Description: Does the character win (0 not hit, 1 hit)

Fields.Name: Cause Weapon Bounce
Fields.Description: Do you play the attack (0 do not play, 1 play)

Fields.Name: Is Disable Destruction on First Appearance
Fields.Description: Broken at the initial appearance of the player (0 ru, 1 no)

Fields.Name: Is Ladder
Fields.Description: Is it a ladder (0 different, 1 yes)

Fields.Name: Is Animation Paused in Cutscene
Fields.Description: Do you want to stop the animation during the poly play (0 not, 1 do)

Fields.Name: Is Moving Object
Fields.Description: Is it a moving object (0 different, 1 yes)

Fields.Name: Destruction - SFX ID
Fields.Description: SFXID when destroying an object (-1 default (810030))

Fields.Name: Navimesh Flag
Fields.Description: Navigation mesh flag set from the object

Fields.Name: Destruction AI Sound ID
Fields.Description: AI sound ID generated at the time of destruction
